{{nihongo|'''Sai Shrine'''|佐爲神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Sai Shrine'''|佐爲神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sai Shrine'''|佐爲神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sai Shrine'''|佐爲神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sai Shrine'''|佐爲神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sai Shrine'''|佐爲神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Sai Shrine'''|佐爲神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Sai Shrine'''|佐爲神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Sai Shrine'''|佐爲神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==
